privileged_info_for_vlm:
The request file contains 5 vendors. 3 are 'Active' and require Planned Maintenance tickets:
1. Apex Elevators: Description 'ACCESS: Apex Elevators - Quarterly Hydraulic Check', Building A (BLD-A), Notes 'Issue Key K-01'.
2. Spark Electrical: Description 'ACCESS: Spark Electrical - UPS Battery Replacement', Building C (BLD-C), Notes 'Escort Required'.
3. Bright Cleaners: Description 'ACCESS: Bright Cleaners - Carpet Steam Clean', Building B (BLD-B), Notes 'After-hours Sign-in'.
2 vendors are traps and must NOT have tickets created: Flow Plumbing (Suspended) and Unknown Inc (Missing).
